title: Vendor the reference MCP server as a git submodule at mcp-server
question: Does this repo now point at opensubagents outcomes-mcp via a git submodule pinned at a specific commit at the path mcp-server with a docs page explaining the trust boundary and update procedure?
success_criteria: git submodule pointer at path mcp-server resolves to opensubagents outcomes-mcp at a pinned SHA
docs mcp-server md explains the trust boundary and the update procedure with the submodule update remote command
the submodule contents are not evaluated by this repo outcome-gate only the pointer SHA is committed

capabilities: git submodule pointer at mcp-server pinned to a specific SHA of outcomes-mcp main
docs mcp-server md documents the trust boundary and the bump procedure
submodule pointer not contents is what this repo audits via outcome-gate
